info.title: Numeraire SwissKnife REST API
info.description: This API is available to anyone with a Numeraire account. The `User Wallet` (`/me`) endpoints are the main access point for users.

get.description: Returns the LNURL payRequest for this LN Address (username). The returned payload contains information allowing the payer to generate an invoice. See [LUDS-06](https://github.com/lnurl/luds/blob/luds/06.md)
Returns the names known by this service given username. The returned payload contains public keys in hex format. See [NIP-05](https://github.com/nostr-protocol/nips/blob/master/05.md)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Username to query

get.description: Returns the callback response for this LN Address (username). Containing an invoice and information on how to behave upon success. See [LUDS-06](https://github.com/lnurl/luds/blob/luds/06.md)

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Amount in millisatoshis

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Optional comment for the recipient

get.description: Returns all the API Keys given a filter

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Total amount of results to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset where to start returning results

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: List of IDs

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: User ID. Automatically populated with your ID

parameters.name: order_direction
parameters.description: Direction of the ordering of results

post.description: Returns the generated API Key for the given user. Users can create API keys with permissions as a subset of his current permissions.

delete.description: Revokes all the API Keys given a filter. Returns the number of revoked keys.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Total amount of results to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset where to start returning results

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: List of IDs

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: User ID. Automatically populated with your ID

parameters.name: order_direction
parameters.description: Direction of the ordering of results

get.description: Returns the API Key by its ID.

delete.description: Revokes an API Key by ID. Returns an empty body.

post.description: Returns a JWT token to be used for authentication. The JWT token contains authentication and permissions. Sign in is only available for `JWT` Auth provider.
Creates the initial Admin user. Returns a JWT token to be used for authentication. The JWT token contains authentication and permissions. Sign up is only available for `JWT` Auth provider.

parameters.description: Status

parameters.name: used
parameters.description: Whether the address has been used

post.description: Returns the generated Bitcoin address for the given user

delete.description: Deletes all the Bitcoin addresses given a filter. Returns the number of deleted addresses. Deleting an address can have an effect on the user balance

delete.description: Deletes an Bitcoin address by ID. Returns an empty body. Deleting a Bitcoin address has an effect on the user balance

get.description: Returns the invoice by its ID
Returns the registered address

put.description: Updates the address. Returns the address details.

post.description: Registers an address. Returns the address details. LN Addresses are ready to receive funds through the LNURL protocol upon registration.

delete.description: Deletes an address. Returns an empty body. Once the address is deleted, it will no longer be able to receive funds and its username can be claimed by another user.

post.description: Pay for a LN invoice, LNURL, LN Address, On-chain or internally to an other user on the same instance. Returns the payment details.

delete.description: Deletes all the payments with `Failed` status. Returns the number of deleted payments

get.description: Returns the payment by its ID.

delete.description: Deletes a payment by ID. Returns an empty body. Deleting a payment has an effect on the user balance

get.description: Returns the health of the system fine-grained by dependency.

post.summary: Marks the welcome flow as completed
post.description: Returns whether the application welcome flow is complete.

get.description: Returns successfully if the server is reachable.
Returns whether the application setup is complete.
Returns the current version and build time of the system.
Returns all the wallets without any linked data. Use the wallet ID to get the full wallet details.

post.description: Returns the generated wallet for the given user

delete.description: Deletes all the wallets given a filter. Returns the number of deleted wallets. Deleting a wallet removes all data related to that wallet.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Total amount of results to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset where to start returning results

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: List of IDs

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: User ID. Automatically populated with your ID

parameters.name: order_direction
parameters.description: Direction of the ordering of results

get.description: Returns all the wallet overviews. A wallet overview is a summary of a wallet with the number of payments, invoices and contacts.
Returns the wallet by its ID.

delete.description: Deletes an wallet by ID. Returns an empty body. Deleting a wallet removes all data related to that wallet.

key.description: API key (only returned once on creation, save it securely as it cannot be retrieved)

permissions.description: List of permissions for this API key

reserved_msat.description: Amount reserved for pending outgoing payments

used.description: Whether the address has already been used on-chain

BtcOutputStatus.description: Confirmation status of an on-chain output.

BtcPayment.description: On-chain Bitcoin details of a payment.

address.description: Destination Bitcoin address. Populated for Bitcoin onchain payments.

block_height.description: Bitcoin block height where the transaction was confirmed.

Contact.description: A counterparty the wallet has paid, with the date of first contact.

contact_since.description: Date of first payment to this contact

permissions.description: List of permissions for this API key

user_id.description: User ID. Will be populated with your own ID by default

Currency.description: The currency and network a transaction is denominated in.

HealthCheck.description: App health information, fine-grained by dependency.

is_healthy.description: Whether the system is healthy and can be used

ln_provider.description: Health of the Lightning provider service

HealthStatus.description: Health of a single system dependency.

InternalPayment.description: Details of a payment settled internally between wallets on the same instance.

btc_address.description: Bitcoin Address. Populated for internal Bitcoin address payments

ln_address.description: Lightning Address. Populated for internal LN Address payments

payment_hash.description: Payment hash. Populated for internal bolt11 payments

Invoice.description: An incoming payment request, over Lightning and/or on-chain.

oneOf.description: Bitcoin output details of the invoice

fee_msat.description: Fees paid. Populated when a new channel is opened to receive the funds.

ln_address_id.description: Lightning Address. Populated when invoice is generated as part of the LNURL protocol

timestamp.description: Date of creation on the LN node

Ledger.description: The ledger a transaction settles on.

active.description: Active status. Inactive addresses cannot receive funds

expiry.description: Duration of expiry in seconds since creation

min_final_cltv_expiry_delta.description: The minimum number of blocks the final hop in the route should wait before allowing the payment to be claimed. This is a security measure to ensure that the payment can be settled properly

payee_pubkey.description: Public key of the node receiving the funds

payment_secret.description: A secret value included in the payment request to mitigate certain types of attacks. The payment secret must be provided by the payer when making the payment

ln_address.description: Lightning Address. Populated when sending to a LN Address

oneOf.description: Success Action. Populated when sending to a LNURL or LN Address

LnURLPayRequest.description: LNURL-pay `payRequest` response served at the well-known endpoint (LUD-06).

callback.description: The URL from LN SERVICE to accept the pay request

commentAllowed.description: Optional number of characters accepted for the `comment` query parameter on subsequent callback, defaults to 0 if not provided. (no comment allowed). See <https://github.com/lnurl/luds/blob/luds/12.md>

maxSendable.description: Max amount in milli-satoshis LN SERVICE is willing to receive

metadata.description: Metadata json which must be presented as raw string here, this is required to pass signature verification at a later step

minSendable.description: Min amount in milli-satoshis LN SERVICE is willing to receive, can not be less than 1 or more than `maxSendable`

LnUrlCallback.description:
LNURL-pay callback response. Carries the invoice to pay and how to behave on
success. Wire shape follows LUD-06 (camelCase fields).

disposable.description: An optional flag to let a wallet know whether to persist the link from step 1, if null should be interpreted as true

routes.description: array with payment routes, should be left empty if no routes are to be provided

oneOf.description: An optional action to be executed after successfully paying an invoice

LnUrlSuccessAction.description: LNURL success action shown to the payer after a successful payment (LUD-09).

url.description: URL for the user to open on success

wallet_id.description: User ID. Will be populated with your own ID by default

description.description: Description of the invoice. Visible by the payer

wallet_id.description: User ID. Will be populated with your own ID by default

NostrNIP05Response.description: Nostr NIP-05 response. Maps each queried name to its hex-encoded public key.

names.description: Found names, keyed by username and valued by hex-encoded public key

OrderDirection.description: Direction of result ordering for list endpoints.

Payment.description: An outgoing payment, over Lightning, on-chain, or internal to the instance.

fee_msat.description: Fees paid. Populated when a new channel is opened to receive the funds

Permission.description: An API access scope granted to a JWT or API key.

wallet_id.description: Wallet ID. Will be populated with your own ID by default

user_id.description: User ID. Should ideally be registered in your Auth provider.

amount_msat.description: Amount in millisatoshis. Only necessary if the input does not specify an amount (empty Bolt11, LNURL or LN Address)

comment.description: Comment of the payment. Visible by the recipient for LNURL payments

input.description: Recipient. Can be a Bolt11 invoice, LNURL or LN Address.

wallet_id.description: Wallet ID. Will be populated with your own ID by default

sign_up_complete.description: Whether the admin user has been created

welcome_complete.description: Whether the welcome flow has been completed

Wallet.description: A user wallet with its balance and linked payments, invoices and contacts.

user_id.description: User ID. Populated from the Authentication method,  such as JWT subject

WalletOverview.description: A lightweight wallet summary with counts in place of the full lists.

user_id.description: User ID. Populated from the Authentication method,  such as JWT subject

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Some endpoints are public, but some require authentication. We provide all the required endpoints to create an account and authorize yourself.

tags.name: User Wallet
tags.description: User Wallet endpoints. Available to any authenticated user.

tags.name: Wallets
tags.description: Wallet management endpoints. Require `read:wallet` or `write:wallet` permissions.

tags.name: Invoices
tags.description: Invoice management endpoints. Require `read:transaction` or `write:transaction` permissions.

tags.name: Payments
tags.description: Payment management endpoints. Require `read:transaction` or `write:transaction` permissions.

tags.name: Lightning Addresses
tags.description: LN Address management endpoints as defined in the [protocol specification](https://lightningaddress.com/). Require `read:ln_address` or `write:ln_address` permissions.

tags.name: LNURL
tags.description: Public LNURL endpoints as defined in the [protocol specification](https://github.com/lnurl/luds). Allows any active Lightning Address to receive payments

tags.name: Nostr
tags.description: Public Nostr endpoints as defined in the [protocol specification](https://github.com/nostr-protocol/nips). Allows any Nostr client to identify a user's public keys

tags.name: API Keys
tags.description: API Key Management. Require `read:api_key` or `write:api_key` permissions.

tags.name: Bitcoin Addresses
tags.description: Bitcoin Address management endpoints. Require `read:btc_address` or `write:btc_address` permissions.
